detectors.description:
Reentrancy in KoishikawaYuki._transfer(address,address,uint256) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#643-767):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#707)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#781-793)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#713)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#801)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#765)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#927)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#907)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#909)
	KoishikawaYuki._rOwned (KoishikawaYuki.sol#319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- KoishikawaYuki._takeTeam(uint256) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#921-929)
	- KoishikawaYuki._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#881-917)
	- KoishikawaYuki.balanceOf(address) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#469-473)
	- KoishikawaYuki.constructor() (KoishikawaYuki.sol#403-433)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#765)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#935)
	KoishikawaYuki._rTotal (KoishikawaYuki.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- KoishikawaYuki._getCurrentSupply() (KoishikawaYuki.sol#1077-1087)
	- KoishikawaYuki._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#933-939)
	- KoishikawaYuki.constructor() (KoishikawaYuki.sol#403-433)
	- KoishikawaYuki.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (KoishikawaYuki.sol#565-587)

Reentrancy in [KoishikawaYuki._transfer(address,address,uint256)](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L643-L767):

	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L713)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L801)
	State variables written after the call(s):

		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L927)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L907)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L909)
	[KoishikawaYuki._rOwned](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [KoishikawaYuki._takeTeam(uint256)](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L921-L929)
	- [KoishikawaYuki._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L881-L917)
	- [KoishikawaYuki.balanceOf(address)](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L469-L473)
	- [KoishikawaYuki.constructor()](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L403-L433)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L765)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L935)
	[KoishikawaYuki._rTotal](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [KoishikawaYuki._getCurrentSupply()](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L1077-L1087)
	- [KoishikawaYuki._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L933-L939)
	- [KoishikawaYuki.constructor()](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L403-L433)
	- [KoishikawaYuki.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](KoishikawaYuki.sol#L565-L587)
